infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pieces needs camera access to take photos and videos for your notes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Pieces needs microphone access to record audio notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pieces needs photo library access to save and select media for your notes.
